mode.title: Mode
mode.description: 'search' = find by company name; 'lookup' = get by LEI code; 'bulk_lookup' = lookup multiple LEI codes

companyName.title: Company Name
companyName.description: Company name to search (used in 'search' mode)

country.title: Country Filter
country.description: ISO-2 country code to filter results (e.g. DE, US, CH)

leiCodes.title: LEI Codes (bulk)
leiCodes.description: List of LEI codes for bulk lookup

includeRelationships.title: Include Ownership Relationships
includeRelationships.description: Also fetch parent/child relationships for each entity
